digest.en: A train crash in Indonesia's Java island killed at least four people and injured dozens. Iran's Foreign Minister is in Russia for talks with President Putin on the Middle East conflict. UK Prime Minister Starmer faces a possible Parliament probe over his ties with Peter Mandelson.
digest.hi: ईरान ने अमेरिका के सामने परमाणु समझौते को लेकर नई शर्तें रखी हैं। ईरान ने कहा है कि वह अमेरिका के साथ परमाणु समझौते पर बातचीत करने को तैयार है अगर अमेरिका ईरान के तेल निर्यात पर लगे प्रतिबंधों को हटा देता है। ईरान के विदेश मंत्री जोहाद अराघची ने कहा है कि वह जल्द ही अमेरिका के साथ बातचीत करेंगे।

articles.title: At least four killed and dozens injured in Indonesia train crash
articles.summary: A commuter train and a long-distance train collided on the outskirts of Jakarta on Monday, killing at least four people and injuring dozens. Officials are likely to investigate the cause of the crash.

articles.title: Iran Offers Plan to Focus on Strait of Hormuz and Delay Nuclear Talks
articles.summary: Iran proposed opening the Strait of Hormuz to shipping traffic and lifting the U. S. blockade in a new offer delivered on Sunday. The plan delays nuclear talks with the U. S. until later.

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Iran Offers To Open Strait Of Hormuz, Gives US Conditions
articles.summary: Iran's minister arrived in Russia as ceasefire talks between the US, Israel, and Iran collapsed. Iran blamed the US for the collapse of the talks. US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Iran Blames US For Collapse Of Talks As Minister Arrives In Russia NDTV.

articles.title: Sam Altman's sister loses lawyers in her sexual abuse lawsuit against OpenAI CEO
articles.summary: Sam Altman's sister lost her lawyers in her sexual abuse lawsuit against OpenAI CEO. The case against Altman continues without her current legal representation. Sam Altman's sister loses lawyers in her sexual abuse lawsuit against OpenAI CEO.

articles.title: US press gala shooting suspect charged with attempting to kill Trump
articles.summary: Cole Thomas Allen was charged with attempting to kill former U. S. President Trump in a shooting at a press gala on Saturday. The suspect's motives are being investigated. Prosecutor says Cole Thomas Allen 'attempted to assassinate the president of the United States' in Saturday attack.

articles.title: Iran’s Foreign Minister Is in Russia for Talks With Putin on Middle East War
articles.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi met with Russian President Vladimir Putin in Moscow to discuss the Middle East conflict. Russia remains a key player in the region. Abbas Araghchi, Iran’s foreign minister, met with President Vladimir V.

articles.title: Canada Setting Up Sovereign Wealth Fund
articles.summary: Canada is setting up a sovereign wealth fund, which will be smaller than those in other oil-producing nations like Norway and the Middle East. The fund's size has not been disclosed.

articles.title: Mexico warns US involvement in anti-drug operation should not to be repeated
articles.summary: Mexico's President Claudia Sheinbaum warned the US against unauthorized involvement in anti-drug operations. A diplomatic note was sent after a US presence was discovered in a Chihuahua operation that resulted in four official deaths.

articles.title: U.K. PM Starmer faces possible Parliament probe over Mandelson
articles.summary: UK Prime Minister Starmer faces a possible Parliament probe over his involvement with Peter Mandelson. This development is part of a scandal that has led to calls for Starmer's resignation.

articles.title: China vows countermeasures if EU enacts 'Made in Europe' plan
articles.summary: China has vowed to take countermeasures if the EU enacts its 'Made in Europe' plan. The plan requires companies to meet EU-made part thresholds to access public funds in strategic sectors.

articles.title: UK-based AI startup Ineffable raises $1.1 billion in Europe's largest seed financing
articles.summary: UK-based AI startup Ineffable raised $1.1 billion in Europe's largest seed financing. The company did not disclose details on how the funds will be used. UK-based AI startup Ineffable raises $1.1 billion in Europe's largest seed financing.

articles.title: Melania Trump urges ABC to 'take stand' on Jimmy Kimmel after widow joke
articles.summary: Melania Trump urged ABC to take a stand against Jimmy Kimmel after he made a joke about her as an "expectant widow" in a parody aired before the White House Correspondents' Dinner. The joke sparked criticism from the First Lady's office.

articles.title: Ceasefire at risk as Pakistan and Afghanistan report cross-border attacks
articles.summary: Pakistan and Afghanistan reported cross-border attacks, putting a ceasefire at risk. The strikes were the first since the two countries agreed to halt violence at peace talks last month. The strikes were the first since the two agreed to halt the violence at peace talks last month.

articles.title: German tourist dies after being bitten at snake show on family holiday in Egypt
articles.summary: A 57-year-old German tourist died after a snake bit him during a show in Egypt. The man was watching a snake-charming performance at a hotel in Hurghada when the reptile crawled into his trousers.

articles.title: At least four killed in train collision on outskirts of Jakarta
articles.summary: At least four people were killed in a train collision on the outskirts of Jakarta. Two trains collided in Bekasi, leaving four dead and 38 passengers rushed to nearby hospitals.

articles.title: Bomb blast on Colombia highway leaves 21 dead amid pre-election violence
articles.summary: A bomb blast on a Colombian highway killed 21 people and injured 56, blamed on cocaine-trafficking rebels. The attack was the country's worst on civilians in decades, ahead of elections.

articles.title: Bahrain strips dozens of citizenship over Iran support
articles.summary: Bahrain's Ministry stripped dozens of people of their citizenship, citing support for hostile Iranian acts, including colluding with foreign entities. The list included dependents, but exact numbers weren't specified.

articles.title: At U.N., U.S. Calls for Coalition of Maritime Freedom On Hormuz
articles.summary: The US called for a coalition to ensure maritime freedom in the Strait of Hormuz at the UN. The initiative aims to secure shipping lanes in the critical waterway. At U. N., U. S.

articles.title: Gunmen kidnap 23 children from Nigerian orphanage
articles.summary: Gunmen kidnapped 23 children from a Nigerian orphanage. Mass kidnappings are a common tactic used by gangs and armed groups to make quick money in Nigeria. Mass kidnappings are a common way for gangs and armed groups to make quick money in Nigeria.

articles.title: Hezbollah Vows to Keep Its Weapons as Lebanon Says Israeli Strikes Killed 14
articles.summary: Hezbollah leader Sayyed Hassan Nasrallah stated that they will keep their weapons. This comes as Israel and Hezbollah have been trading daily attacks despite a cease-fire, with 14 reported killed in recent Israeli strikes.

articles.title: David Attenborough centenary celebrations start with closer look at 'Life on Earth'
articles.summary: The BBC began centenary celebrations for David Attenborough with a closer look at his documentary series 'Life on Earth'. The series is being re-released to mark the occasion. David Attenborough centenary celebrations start with closer look at 'Life on Earth'.

articles.title: ईरान होर्मुज खोलने को तैयार, अमेरिका के सामने रखी ये शर्तें; ट्रंप ने सुरक्षा टीम के साथ की बैठक
articles.summary: ईरान ने अमेरिका के सामने शर्तें रखकर होर्मुज जलसंधि को फिर से खोलने की पेशकश की है। अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने सुरक्षा टीम के साथ बैठक की। यह बैठक पश्चिम एशिया में बढ़ते तनाव के बीच हुई।

articles.summary: संयुक्त राष्ट्र के प्रमुख ने कहा है कि दुनिया परमाणु हथियारों के खतरे को नहीं भूली है। उन्होंने परमाणु संधि में फिर से जान डालने की आवश्यकता पर जोर दिया। यह बयान वैश्विक सुरक्षा चिंताओं के बीच आया है।

articles.summary: पाकिस्तान ने संयुक्त राष्ट्र से कहा है कि भारत का सिंधु जल संधि को निलंबित करना दक्षिण एशिया की शांति और सुरक्षा के लिए गंभीर परिणाम ला सकता है। इस फैसले से पाकिस्तान को एक साल में नुकसान हुआ है।

articles.summary: हिजबुल्ला ने इस्राइल से सीधी बातचीत से इनकार कर दिया है. इस बीच, दक्षिणी लेबनान में IDF ने हमला किया, जिस पर नेतन्याहू ने टिप्पणी की. प. एशिया: हिजबुल्ला का इस्राइल से सीधी बातचीत से इनकार; दक्षिणी लेबनान में IDF के हमले; नेतन्याहू ने क्या कहा?

articles.title: अमेरिका-ईरान में शांति वार्ता क्यों नहीं: कहां अटकी है बात, क्या है नया प्रस्ताव; क्या चाहते हैं
articles.summary: अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच शांति वार्ता में अनिश्चितता बनी हुई है। बातचीत को लेकर स्थिति गंभीर होती जा रही है और टकराव की संभावना बढ़ रही है। अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच तनाव कम करने के लिए नए प्रस्तावों पर विचार किया जा रहा है।

articles.title: होर्मुज बना आर्थिक युद्ध का अखाड़ा
articles.summary: होर्मुज जलडमरू बन गया है आर्थिक युद्ध का अखाड़ा। इस क्षेत्र में तनाव बढ़ने से वैश्विक अर्थव्यवस्था पर असर पड़ रहा है। विचार: होर्मुज बना आर्थिक युद्ध का अखाड़ा Jagran।

articles.title: ईरान में इंटरनेट पाबंदी की वजह से लाखों नौकरियां ख़त्म, इस हालात के लिए ज़िम्मेदार कौन?
articles.summary: ईरान में इंटरनेट पाबंदी के कारण लगभग 10 लाख नौकरियां समाप्त हो गई हैं। करीब एक करोड़ लोग अपने काम के लिए स्थिर इंटरनेट कनेक्टिविटी पर निर्भर हैं। शुरुआती आकलनों के अनुसार इंटरनेट पर जारी पाबंदियों की वजह से 10 लाख से ज़्यादा नौकरियां जा चुकी हैं.
